title: Documentary Requirements for Processing. The processing of
content: 45 seafarers shall comply with the following requirements prescribed by the Department to 46 be implemented through the Seabased Accreditation Bureau (SAB), subject to the 47 provisions of R.A. No. 10173, its IRR, and the rules and regulations of the National Privacy 48 Commission: 49 50 1. Request for processing using the prescribed form of the Department indicating 51 the name, position and salary of seafarer, contract duration and the name of the 52 principal/employer and ship 53 54 2. Four (4) original copies of the full text of the SEC for seafarers, one (1) copy for 55 the DMW, one (1) copy for the seafarer, and one (1) copy for the LMA, and one 56 (1) copy for the principal/employer to be kept on-board during the employment 57 period; 58 59 3. Valid SRB; 60 61 38 4. Valid certificate of cover/entry or other proof of coverage for compulsory 1 insurance, at no cost to the seafarer; 2 3 5. Seafarer’s E-registration; and 4 5 6. Other relevant documents as may be required by the Department under 6 subsequent guidelines. 7 8 Additional requirements shall be prescribed for fishers and workers in the intermodal 9 sector under subsequent guidelines. 10 11 The LMA shall ensure that a copy of the duly processed DMW-approved SEC is provided 12 to its hired seafarer. Likewise, LMAs and their principals shall ensure that their seafarers 13 have a valid work, transit, or any appropriate visa or its equivalent document prior to their 14 deployment. 15 16
